page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped to 2 physical cores, resulting in 1.0 thread per core. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server type does not include any bundled local storage or integrated GPU hardware. Network and storage operations rely entirely on external block storage volumes. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with the base configuration.

With a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high parallel compute power. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring a larger memory footprint relative to a low core count, such as small-scale databases, caching layers, and lightweight enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 2 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, delivering a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The configuration does not include bundled local storage or GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage. With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance is structured for memory-optimized workloads that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand high core counts. It is suitable for small-scale databases, caching systems, and lightweight application servers requiring consistent memory availability.
